attachments.fallback: How to Merge PST Files Without Duplicates? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If you are searching for a method to merge PST files without duplicates, then you can use the <https://www.sysinfotools.com/recovery/pst-merge.php|SysInfo PST Merge Tool>. This tool consolidates emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, and other Outlook data from multiple PST files into a single, large PST. It also provides features like duplicate email removal, the option to exclude attachments before merging, and a preview function. It’s compatible with…
attachments.title: How to Merge PST Files Without Duplicates? [How-to Discussions]

attachments.fallback: How to Convert OST Files to PST? - @AlicaHarding
attachments.text: It is very easy to convert OST files to PST format. You can do it in two ways. The first is the manual method, where you can convert OST to PST format, but it doesn’t work with orphaned, oversized, or corrupted files. In such situations, I would recommend using FixVare <https://www.fixvare.com/products/ost/pst/|OST to PST Converter>. This tool can smoothly convert any OST file, including orphaned, corrupted, or damaged ones, into PST format…
attachments.title: How to Convert OST Files to PST? [How-to Discussions]
